---
title: "test_code_sentinel_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_code_sentinel_empire.py"
loc: 15
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.52
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.77
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_heimdall_scan_orphans, test_heimdall_ignore_main. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.code_sentinel](file://src.tools.code_sentinel)

### Exports
- `test_heimdall_scan_orphans`
- `test_heimdall_ignore_main`
